text: Stepping inside this space, I am wrapped in a blend of anticipation and slight estrangement. The glass barrier feels both inviting and insulating—a threshold between the world outside and the world of ideas within. The invocation of 'R+D' hints at continual transformation, yet the clinical brightness and abstract displays put me in a contemplative mood. I am present, curious, yet hovering on the edge of full immersion, as though I am pausing at the doorway of discovery, waiting to cross into deeper engagement.
